chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ صَوْمِ شَعْبَانَ وَ صِلَتِهِ بِرَمَضَانَ وَ صِيَامِ ثَلَاثَةِ أَيَّامٍ فِي كُلِّ شَهْرٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – Merits of the Fasts of Shaban and its relating with Ramazan, and the three Fasts during every month

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق على الظه ر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/259)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق على الظه ر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/259)
text: قَالَ إِنَّمَا يُصَامُ يَوْمُ الْأَرْبِعَاءِ لِأَنَّهُ لَمْ تُعَذَّبْ أُمَّةٌ فِيمَا مَضَى إِلَّا فِي يَوْمِ الْأَرْبِعَاءِ وَسَطِ الشَّهْرِ فَيُسْتَحَبُّ أَنْ يُصَامَ ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa Bin Ubeyd, from Yunus, from Is’haq Bin Ammar,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘But rather, one should Fast the day of Wednesday, because no past community has been Punished except during the day of Wednesday in the middle of the month. Thus, it is recommended that one Fasts that day’.
en.sarwar: 12. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa ibn ‘Ubayd from Yunus from Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that there is fasting on Wednesday because for all nations upon which torment descended, it occurred on a Wednesday in the middle of the month. It is desirable to fast on that day.”
